languages.text: "...тем более жалок тот факт, что эти представители своей цивилизации, якобы наделенные всеми возможными для их культуры привилегиями, оставляют после себя поразительно мало сколько-то значимых следов, предпочитая мелочные склоки и ссоры с современниками..."

traits.locale_text: "Вольные Торговцы — особые представители Человечества, которым дано некоторое подобие свободы от ограниченных правил их цивилизации. Тем более жалок тот факт, что они оставляют после себя поразительно мало сколько-то значимых следов, предпочитая мелочные склоки и ссоры с современниками".

languages.text: "...only makes it all the more pathetic that these members of the human civilisation, supposedly endowed with as many privileges as their culture allows, leave remarkably few traces of historical significance behind them, preferring to engage in petty squabbles and quarrels with their contemporaries..."
languages.original_text: "...тем более жалок тот факт, что эти представители своей цивилизации, якобы наделенные всеми возможными для их культуры привилегиями, оставляют после себя поразительно мало сколько-то значимых следов, предпочитая мелочные склоки и ссоры с современниками..."

traits.locale_text: "...only makes it all the more pathetic that these members of the human civilisation, supposedly endowed with as many privileges as their culture allows, leave remarkably few traces of historical significance behind them, preferring petty squabbles and quarrels with their contemporaries..."

"...only makes it all the more pathetic that these members of the human civilisation, supposedly endowed with as many privileges as their culture allows, leave remarkably few traces of historical significance behind them, preferring to engage in petty squabbles and quarrels with their contemporaries..."

"Rogue Traders are special members of Humanity who are granted some semblance of freedom from the restrictive rules of their civilisation. That only makes it all the more pathetic that they leave remarkably few traces of historical significance behind them, preferring petty squabbles and quarrels with their contemporaries."

"...only makes it all the more pathetic that these members of the human civilisation, supposedly endowed with as many privileges as their culture allows, leave remarkably few traces of historical significance behind them, preferring petty squabbles and quarrels with their contemporaries..."

"...only makes it all the more pathetic that these members of the human civilisation, supposedly endowed with as many privileges as their culture allows, leave remarkably few traces of historical significance behind them, preferring to engage in petty squabbles and quarrels with their contemporaries..."

languages.text: “……这就更让人觉得可悲了。这些人类文明的成员，明明被赋予了其文化所容许的一切特权，却几乎没留下什么有历史意义的痕迹，反而热衷于跟同时代的人互相倾轧、争吵不休……”
languages.original_text: "...only makes it all the more pathetic that these members of the human civilisation, supposedly endowed with as many privileges as their culture allows, leave remarkably few traces of historical significance behind them, preferring to engage in petty squabbles and quarrels with their contemporaries..."

traits.locale_text: “……这就更让人觉得可悲了。这些人类文明的成员，明明被赋予了其文化所容许的一切特权，却几乎没留下什么有历史意义的痕迹，反而热衷于跟同时代的人互相倾轧、争吵不休……”

languages.text: «... solo hace que la falta de importancia histórica de estos integrantes de la civilización humana, dotados de tantos privilegios como su cultura puede ofrecerles, resulte aún más patética, al ser fruto de su tendencia a librar disputas insignificantes con sus coetáneos...».
languages.original_text: "...only makes it all the more pathetic that these members of the human civilisation, supposedly endowed with as many privileges as their culture allows, leave remarkably few traces of historical significance behind them, preferring to engage in petty squabbles and quarrels with their contemporaries..."

traits.locale_text: «... solo hace que la falta de importancia histórica de estos integrantes de la civilización humana, dotados de tantos privilegios como su cultura puede ofrecerles, resulte aún más patética, al ser fruto de su tendencia a librar disputas insignificantes con sus coetáneos...».

languages.text: « ... c'est d'autant plus pathétique que ces membres à part de l'espèce humaine, qui bénéficient de tous les privilèges de leur culture, laissent si peu de traces d'une quelconque importance historique dans leur sillage, préférant se livrer à des querelles insignifiantes avec leurs contemporains. »
languages.original_text: "...only makes it all the more pathetic that these members of the human civilisation, supposedly endowed with as many privileges as their culture allows, leave remarkably few traces of historical significance behind them, preferring to engage in petty squabbles and quarrels with their contemporaries..."

traits.locale_text: « ... c'est d'autant plus pathétique que ces membres à part de l'espèce humaine, qui bénéficient de tous les privilèges de leur culture, laissent si peu de traces d'une quelconque importance historique dans leur sillage, préférant se livrer à des querelles insignifiantes avec leurs contemporains. »

languages.text: "Kültürlerinin elverdiği en büyük ayrıcalıklarla donatıldığı varsayılan insan medeniyetinin bu mensuplarının; çağdaşlarıyla ufak tefek çekişmelere ve kavgalara girmeyi tercih ederek arkalarında tarihî öneme sahip çok az iz bırakması, durumu daha da acınası kılıyor..."
languages.original_text: "...only makes it all the more pathetic that these members of the human civilisation, supposedly endowed with as many privileges as their culture allows, leave remarkably few traces of historical significance behind them, preferring to engage in petty squabbles and quarrels with their contemporaries..."

traits.locale_text: "Kültürlerinin elverdiği en büyük ayrıcalıklarla donatıldığı varsayılan insan medeniyetinin bu mensuplarının; çağdaşlarıyla ufak tefek çekişmelere ve kavgalara girmeyi tercih ederek arkalarında tarihî öneme sahip çok az iz bırakması, durumu daha da acınası kılıyor..."

languages.text: "... macht es umso erbärmlicher, dass diese Mitglieder der menschlichen Zivilisation, die vermutlich über sämtliche Privilegien ihrer Kultur verfügen, erstaunlich wenige Spuren von historischer Bedeutung hinterlassen, weil sie belangloses Gezänk mit ihren Zeitgenossen vorziehen ..."
languages.original_text: "...only makes it all the more pathetic that these members of the human civilisation, supposedly endowed with as many privileges as their culture allows, leave remarkably few traces of historical significance behind them, preferring to engage in petty squabbles and quarrels with their contemporaries..."

traits.locale_text: "... macht es umso erbärmlicher, dass diese Mitglieder der menschlichen Zivilisation, die vermutlich über sämtliche Privilegien ihrer Kultur verfügen, erstaunlich wenige Spuren von historischer Bedeutung hinterlassen, weil sie belangloses Gezänk mit ihren Zeitgenossen vorziehen ..."

languages.text: 「…文化が許すほどの特権を備えているはずの人類文明の構成員が、歴史的に重要な痕跡をほとんど残さず、同時代の人たちと些細な争いばかりに明け暮れているのは、実に哀れなことです…」
languages.original_text: "...only makes it all the more pathetic that these members of the human civilisation, supposedly endowed with as many privileges as their culture allows, leave remarkably few traces of historical significance behind them, preferring to engage in petty squabbles and quarrels with their contemporaries..."

traits.locale_text: 「…文化が許すほどの特権を備えているはずの人類文明の構成員が、歴史的に重要な痕跡をほとんど残さず、同時代の人たちと些細な争いばかりに明け暮れているのは、実に哀れなことです…」
